## Problem

Describe the workflow gap or friction.

## Proposal

Describe the behavior you want `jk` to provide.

## Alternatives

List any existing `jj`, shell, or editor workflow that partly solves this today.

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, command examples, or links to related `jj` behavior when useful.
